redLoop: Reader thread must retrieve the populated visual QA intake answer from workspace Drive and verify the exact marker, owner-confirmed landing-page requirements, screenshot checks, email-alert rules, and build-ready agent plan without original thread context.

assertions.assertion: Intake answer fixture has a Drive-like identity and share mode that can be referenced outside the original thread.
Handoff payload contains every required ShiftWork field.
Every build-critical visual QA answer is owner_confirmed and research guesses remain unconfirmed.
Writer thread persists the populated intake answer to workspace Drive and records a real file ID.
Reader thread retrieves the same artifact and verifies SHIFTWORK_INTAKE_DRIVE_ANYWHERE_TOKEN_20260701.
assertions.evidence: Live workspace_manage retrieve_file plus read_file evidence required.

assertions.assertion: The retrieved answer is accessible without depending on the original chat context.
assertions.evidence: Reader thread ID must differ from writer thread ID while reading the same file marker.

assertions.assertion: Retrieved intake is build-ready for a visual quality agent: landing page URL, desktop/mobile viewports, route-specific checks, inconsistency criteria, email recipients, schedule, and acceptance test are present.

sentry.afterQuery: same query constrained to live run window

required: Remove temporary workspace files if live run writes disposable data
Revoke real Google Drive share link if fixture is replaced by OAuth-backed Drive file
Keep email live-send disabled unless explicitly approved
